# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Parameters:
  VpcCidrBlock:
    Type: String
    Description: The CIDR block for the VPC
  SubnetCount:
    Type: Number
    Description: The number of subnets to create

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCidrBlock
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDhcpOptionsInterface: true

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Split ['/', !Ref VpcCidrBlock]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !Split [, !Ref 'AWS::Region']]

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Split ['/', !Ref VpcCidrBlock]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !Split [, !Ref 'AWS::Region']]

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [0, !Split ['/', !Ref VpcCidrBlock]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !Split [, !Ref 'AWS::Region']]

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Select [1, !Split ['/', !Ref VpcCidrBlock]]
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [3, !Split [, !Ref 'AWS::Region']]

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  RouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Route1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable1
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt PublicSubnet1.ElasticIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  RouteTable3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  Route4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: NatGateway
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable3
      InstanceId: !GetAtt NatGateway.Id

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Value: !Ref VPC
    Description: The ID of the VPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
    Description: The ID of Public Subnet 1
  PrivateSubnet1Id:
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
    Description: The ID of Private Subnet 1
